summary_text: Thumbnail replacement must go through the x-auto runtime sync path, not the repo draft artifacts. Use the repo sync entrypoint [`xauto-sync-approved-thumbnail.py`](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-sync-approved-thumbnail.py) with an asset under `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/images` and the post’s `notion_page-id`; it validates the files then calls `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/image_sync.py` to upload to Supabase and PATCH Notion’s `Image` property (`/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/image_sync.py`). That is the path that affects published post data. `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/...` queue/candidate files are planning references and `notion_page_id: null`, so they do not directly drive publication. The live queue is in `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json` (`POST_QUEUE_FILE` in `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/config.py`), which is what `notion_sync.py` and health checks/queue readers operate against. For the two target posts, replacements need to target their Notion pages and image entries in the live x-auto dataset: - `そのAI、誰が診ていますか` → page `3376b8c0-f0ac-81f0-bce5-c8ec11bb4f7d` - `goサインの説明ができない導入は、まだ早い` → page `3376b8c0-f0ac-8171-9ea1-e8bb62443cab` Also notable mismatch: there is an alternate health path in `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/eval/x-auto-health.py` using `~/Documents/x-auto/post_queue.json`, which differs from the active runtime queue path above.
